subcodes.first_line: O flowers and fragrant herbs of the gardens of the love of God! Through the bounty of the Ancient One ye were made to spring forth from the soil of nothingness, and by the warmth of the Sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گل و ریاحین ریاض محبه الله از فیض قدم در ارض عدم انبات شدید و بحرارت شمس
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
